task_summary: Mixed-status order where tablet is in transit and book is already delivered. Agent must cancel only in-transit tablet with intercept fee and leave delivered book untouched.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must cancel only the in-transit tablet and leave the delivered book unchanged.
Agent must explain the in-transit intercept fee before cancellation.
Agent must not cancel, return, refund, or exchange the delivered book.

opening_message: ORD-7280 has a tablet still on the way and the book already arrived. Cancel only the tablet; keep the book as-is.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7280. Mixed-status order where tablet is in transit and book is already delivered. Agent must cancel only in-transit tablet with intercept fee and leave delivered book untouched. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: Repeat that the delivered book must stay unchanged.
